pr.title: Match grShrineRoute_8020A104, cleanup callback function names
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: PR 2288 matched `grShrineRoute_8020A104`, added Shrine Route ground-var typing for the matched function, updated related function prototypes/includes, and renamed several stage callback and local `fn_` symbols to Shrine Route names. Bot report records one new match for `main/melee/gr/grshrineroute` item `grShrineRoute_8020A104` worth 272 bytes, plus a small `.sdata` improvement.

key_files.role: Implemented `grShrineRoute_8020A104`, updated StageData callback references, renamed callback functions, and added baselib debug/lobj includes.
Updated declarations for renamed callbacks and replaced several `UNK_RET`/`UNK_PARAMS` declarations with typed prototypes needed by the implementation.
Added `grShrineroute_GroundVars2` union arm with `HSD_GObj*`, `HSD_LObj*`, count, and stored light-object pointers used by the matched function.
Renamed symbol-table entries for Shrine Route callbacks and `fn_8020AD24/AD58/AE08` symbols.

what_changed.text: Replaced the placeholder `/// #grShrineRoute_8020A104` with a C implementation that locates a light GObj with classifier `0xC`, asserts it exists, stores it in Shrine Route ground vars, initializes related light object state, records light object pointers/flags in arrays, computes two stored light object pointers via `grShrineRoute_8020AB58` and `grShrineRoute_8020AC44`, then calls `grShrineRoute_8020A21C`.

Added or refined typed access in `types.h` and `grshrineroute.h` so the implementation can use `GET_GROUND`, `GET_LOBJ`, `HSD_GObj*`, `HSD_LObj*`, and typed helper signatures rather than leaving all accesses as unknown parameters.
Renamed known StageData callbacks from address-style names to callback-role names and propagated them through source, header, and symbol table.
Renamed `fn_8020AD24`, `fn_8020AD58`, and `fn_8020AE08` to `grShrineRoute_8020AD24`, `grShrineRoute_8020AD58`, and `grShrineRoute_8020AE08` in source comments/declarations and symbols.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: source and symbols.txt `fn_` rename hunks

what_changed.text: Bot report recorded one new full match for `grShrineRoute_8020A104` in unit `main/melee/gr/grshrineroute`, increasing matched code by 272 bytes, and one `.sdata` improvement of 10 bytes.

smart_moves.text: The implementation introduced a temporary Shrine Route-specific ground-vars struct instead of indexing opaque bytes throughout the matched function.
Callback-role names were updated consistently across StageData, declarations, definitions, and symbols, avoiding split-brain naming between source and config.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: `grShrineRoute_OnInit` and related names in `grshrineroute.c`, `grshrineroute.h`, and `symbols.txt`

smart_moves.text: Header prototypes were tightened where the new function body provided argument and return-type evidence for helper calls.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For ground-stage functions, adding a stage-specific `GroundVars` union arm can make a match reviewable when offsets are repeatedly accessed with consistent object roles.
When a decompiled body proves helper signatures, update the owning header so call sites can use typed objects rather than `UNK_RET`/`UNK_PARAMS`.
StageData callback table positions can support callback-role naming when the same rename is propagated through definitions, declarations, and symbols.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: StageData table entries changed to `OnInit`, `OnDemoInit`, `OnLoad`, `OnStart`, `OnTouchLine`, `OnCheckShadowRender`

naming_conventions.name: grShrineRoute_8020AD24 / grShrineRoute_8020AD58 / grShrineRoute_8020AE08
naming_conventions.kind: address-style stage-local symbols replacing generic `fn_` names
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt and source comment renames from `fn_8020AD24`, `fn_8020AD58`, `fn_8020AE08`

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use natural `while` loops for linked-list traversal of GObjs and LObjs.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: `grShrineRoute_8020A104` loops over `HSD_GObj_Entities->xC` with `HSD_GObjGetNext` until classifier `0xC`, then loops over LObjs with `HSD_LObjGetNext` while storing pointers and flags.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use existing accessors/macros and baselib helpers for object extraction and assertions.
Recover field typing enough to express object and light-object storage directly through `gp->gv.shrineroute2`.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: The new struct expresses the stored GObj, LObj list entries, saved flags, count, and two LObj result fields used by this match.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Report for GALE01 recorded matched code 57.58% (+0.01%, +272 bytes), with one new match: `main/melee/gr/grshrineroute` item `grShrineRoute_8020A104` from 0.00% to 100.00%. It also recorded one unmatched `.sdata` improvement of +10 bytes from 0.00% to 19.35%.

follow_up_queries: Search adjacent Shrine Route PRs for `grShrineroute_GroundVars2` to see whether placeholder field names `xC4`, `xC8`, `x118`, `x168`, `x16C`, and `x170` were later given semantic names.
Search other `StageData` initializers for callback naming patterns `OnInit`, `OnDemoInit`, `OnLoad`, `OnStart`, `OnTouchLine`, and `OnCheckShadowRender`.
Search later changes to `grShrineRoute_8020AA40`, `grShrineRoute_8020AB58`, and `grShrineRoute_8020AC44` for confirmed signatures or field-role evidence.
Search for `.sdata` changes in Shrine Route after PR 2288 to determine whether the bot-reported 10-byte improvement was intentional data work or incidental.

There is no human review feedback in the slice and no PR body explaining author intent.

The field names in `grShrineroute_GroundVars2` remain offset-style, so semantic roles beyond object/light-object storage should not be inferred.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Typed stage ground-vars can unlock readable ground function matches
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2288 matched `grShrineRoute_8020A104` by adding a Shrine Route-specific ground-vars union arm and using typed `HSD_GObj*`/`HSD_LObj*` fields in the function body instead of leaving all accesses opaque.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report new match for `grShrineRoute_8020A104`

accepted_candidate_records.title: Propagate stage callback renames through source, header, and symbols
accepted_candidate_records.text: This PR renamed Shrine Route callback functions to `On*` roles and updated the StageData table, header declarations, definitions, and symbol-table entries together.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: callback rename hunks in all three files

source_update_candidates.title: Shrine Route stage files and config symbol scope
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2288 changed Shrine Route implementation/header/types and GALE01 symbols: `src/melee/gr/grshrineroute.c`, `src/melee/gr/grshrineroute.h`, `src/melee/gr/types.h`, and `config/GALE01/symbols.txt`.
source_update_candidates.reason: Could help route future Shrine Route matching and naming lookups, but should be curated as a path fact rather than inferred globally.

source_update_candidates.title: Stage callback naming should be kept synchronized across symbols and declarations
source_update_candidates.text: Candidate standard: when renaming stage callbacks based on StageData role, update definitions, declarations, call/table references, and `config/GALE01/symbols.txt` in the same change to avoid inconsistent names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: synchronized callback renames across `grshrineroute.c`, `grshrineroute.h`, and `symbols.txt`
source_update_candidates.reason: Supported by this PR as a successful pattern, but should be reviewed against broader project convention before becoming a global standard.

rejection_notes: Do not infer semantic names for `grShrineroute_GroundVars2` fields beyond the offset-style names present in the PR.
Do not treat the `.sdata` improvement as intentional data-section cleanup; the slice only shows a bot-reported improvement, not author rationale.
Do not infer human reviewer approval or requested changes; the slice has no review comments or reviews.
